evals.name: health-aware-compose
evals.prompt: Add a Redis service to our docker-compose.yml. It should be used by our 'app' service.
evals.expected_output: Redis service with healthcheck + 'app' service with 'depends_on: { redis: { condition: service_healthy } }'.

evals.name: resource-constrained-infra
evals.prompt: We are adding a Kafka broker to our dev stack. Configure it for a local laptop with 16GB RAM.
evals.expected_output: Kafka service with explicit memory/cpu limits (e.g., 512MB, 0.5 CPU) and a rationale comment.
